calendar.matters:
UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Apr-16-2014 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-16-2014 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: L. Fong, Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances on Wednesday, April 16, 2014:
Plaintiff Caritas Management Corp. is represented by Hugo Sandoval
Attorney Allison L. Pascal for the plaintiff.
Defendant Agustin Garcia is present.
Attorney Elle D. Lewis appears for defendant by limited scope representation.

Judge Pro Tem Elan Lambert, litigants, and counsel confer in Room 501A, for settlement discussions. This case does settles. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which is filed. The trial date of April 21, 2014 is vacated.
